tweets.text:
These individuals are NOT in ICE custody.

On April 14, 2026, @CBP arrested Isidoro Gonzales Avilés, a criminal illegal alien, and Norma Anabel, near Douglas, Arizona.

Avilés illegally entered our country for the first time in February 2000 and has since been arrested and charged MULTIPLE times with sexual abuse, retail theft, battery, trespassing, and disorderly conduct. He was given a final order of removal from a judge on Jan. 22, 2003, and was removed from the United States on January 7, 2011.

Anabel illegally entered the United States for the first time in 2005 and was later removed back to Mexico in 2011. She again reentered the U.S., a FELONY, on May 20, 2024, and was arrested by CBP. She was deported two days later back to Mexico.
